title: How to prompt AI when there's nothing to design
summary: JavaScript Mastery published a video about prompt engineering strategies for AI when working on design tasks with minimal existing reference material. The video appears to address practical techniques for eliciting useful AI outputs in design scenarios where constraints are loose or undefined.
